examples: Lost fingers and limbs will be able to regrow.
Rainforests easily regrow after small-scale clearing.
She says: "I believe that the day is not far off when we will be able to prescribe drugs that cause severed spinal cords to heal, hearts to regenerate and lost limbs to regrow."
It's part of the hot field of tissue regeneration, trying to regrow all kinds of body parts.
Harvesters pick the seaweed on beaches, cutting the plants with a short-bladed knife to allow them to regrow.
